criteria.description: The public longpage renders a proper header, removes the full-report entry, and keeps Hero, Agent Prompt, Share, and Journey in the intended order.
criteria.notes: Integration coverage now asserts the dedicated header surface, the removed full-report link, and the page section order.

criteria.description: The accept CTA emphasizes the Agent Prompt target, share actions render the four social platforms, and locale behavior remains intact.
criteria.notes: The regression suite covers prompt emphasis, locale persistence, and the new social action row.

criteria.description: The journey remains playable and the production bundle builds successfully after the density and interaction refit.
criteria.evidence: npm run test && npm run build
criteria.notes: All 25 tests passed and the Vite production build completed successfully.

criteria.description: The local preview is reachable for manual review.
criteria.notes: The preview server returned HTTP 200 on the final page.

criteria.description: All four work packages completed implement and review, and each reached approved status in the Spec Kitty workflow.
criteria.notes: WP01 through WP04 are all in the approved lane on the mission branch.
